headline: Assessing Boston Scientific (BSX) Valuation After Recent Penumbra Acquisition And Share Price Weakness
summary: Why Boston Scientific is on investors’ radar today Boston Scientific (BSX) sits at the center of the medical devices story, and its stock performance over the past year gives investors a clear snapshot of how the market currently values that position. See our latest analysis for Boston Scientific.
